opportunities.title: Google Cloud Flywheel Hackathon

opportunities.title: Flipkart GRiD 7.0 - Software Development Track
opportunities.description: Flipkart's flagship engineering challenge for students and developers. Build scalable, high-performance solution prototypes for e-commerce problems.

opportunities.title: Accenture Innovation Challenge 2026
opportunities.description: Create innovative technology solutions to solve real-world industry problems. Track options include AI, sustainability, and cloud technologies.

opportunities.title: Tata Imagination Challenge 2026
opportunities.description: National level case study and innovation challenge for student builders, innovators, and thinkers. Big prizes and direct interviews.

opportunities.title: Reliance TUP (The Ultimate Pitch)
opportunities.description: One of India's biggest national ideation and product pitch competitions. Submit your prototype, receive mentoring, and pitch live.

opportunities.title: ETHIndia 2026

opportunities.title: Polygon Guild Hackathon

opportunities.title: Solana Speedrun

opportunities.title: Build on Base India
opportunities.description: Base bootcamps and hackathon for Indian builders. Focus on consumer apps, payments, and creator economy integrations.

opportunities.description: Prize: $4,000 in prizes. Themes: Health.

opportunities.title: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
opportunities.description: Provides vital financial assistance to early-stage startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, market entry, and commercialization. Offers up to ₹20 Lakhs for validation and prototype, and up to ₹30 Lakhs for market entry via incubators.

opportunities.title: MSME Idea Hackathon 4.0
opportunities.organizer: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises
opportunities.description: Part of the MSME Innovative Scheme. Provides 100% equity-free incubation grants of up to ₹15 Lakhs per approved idea to foster grassroot innovation, advanced technical development, and localized design solutions.

opportunities.title: iStart Rajasthan Viability Grant & Sustenance Allowance
opportunities.organizer: Department of IT&C, Government of Rajasthan (RTIH)
opportunities.description: Flagship scheme under the Rajasthan Tech Innovation Hub (RTIH) and Techno Hub Jaipur. Startups receive non-dilutive viability grants up to ₹15 Lakhs alongside monthly sustenance allowances of ₹20,000 to validate and scale their MVPs.
opportunities.funding_range: Up to ₹15 Lakhs + Monthly Stamped Allowance
opportunities.prize_pool_display: Up to ₹15 Lakhs + Monthly Stamped Allowance

opportunities.title: BIRAC Biotechnology Ignition Grant (BIG) Scheme
opportunities.description: The largest early-stage biotech grant scheme in India, supporting high-risk, high-reward innovations. Designed for young researchers and startups working on HealthTech, medical devices, AgriTech, and bio-industrial tools.

opportunities.title: MeitY SAMRIDH Accelerator & Matching Seed Fund
opportunities.organizer: Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY), Gov of India
opportunities.description: Supports software product startups with funding, mentorship, and international market access. Offers matching grants of up to ₹40 Lakhs alongside deep-dive growth accelerator bootcamps.

opportunities.title: DST NIDHI-PRAYAS Prototype Grant
opportunities.organizer: Department of Science and Technology, Gov of India
opportunities.description: Focuses on bridging the critical gap between idea and prototype by providing hardware/physical space, testing labs, and non-dilutive prototype-building grants. Best suited for robotics, IoT, and clean technologies.

opportunities.title: MeitY GENESIS DeepTech Support Scheme
opportunities.organizer: Ministry of Electronics & IT, Gov of India
opportunities.description: GENESIS (Gen-Next Support for Innovative Startups) provides seed grants and structured incubation support specifically targeting tech startups in tier-II and tier-III cities, focusing on Quantum, CyberSecurity, and AI.

opportunities.title: TANSEED Green & DeepTech Seed Grant
opportunities.description: TANSEED (Tamil Nadu Startup Seed Grant Fund) provides equity-free grants of ₹10 Lakhs to early-stage greenfield startups, enabling innovators to transition from proof-of-concept to pilot execution.

opportunities.title: Ratan Tata Innovation Hub (RTIH) AP Development Scheme
opportunities.organizer: Government of Andhra Pradesh / Ratan Tata Trust
opportunities.description: Provides startup incubation, high-end executive mentorship, and financial seed support for early-stage ventures in South India. Backed by Andhra Pradesh state and Ratan Tata trusts to foster deep industrial tech.

opportunities.title: Google for Startups Accelerator: India AI Cohort
opportunities.description: Three-month equity-free program for high-potential Indian startups using AI/ML to solve critical problems. Provides top-tier Google mentor support, cloud architecture credits, and specialized business bootcamps.

opportunities.title: SIDBI Startup Venture Capital & Credit Grant
opportunities.organizer: Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI)
opportunities.description: Strategic institutional seed capital and debt-led assistance schemes for Indian MSMEs. Supports innovative financial models, blockchain payment infrastructure, and banking-as-a-service startups.
opportunities.funding_range: Up to ₹1 Crore Seed Fund & Debt Support
opportunities.prize_pool_display: Up to ₹1 Crore Seed Fund & Debt Support
